_comment: Proven Phase-2 prototype findings for xavc_l_1080p50.mxf (ffmpeg-produced XAVC-L). Used as a documented regression target; the unit tests reconstruct an equivalent synthetic GOP and assert the parsers/resolver reproduce these values. SPS/PPS were confirmed in-band.

miniGop._comment: A single closed IBBP unit: decode order I P B B displays as I B B P.
